markdownRemark.html:
Jirayu is currently a dual-degree student in the Doctor of Medicine and Master of Engineering (Biomedical Engineering) at the Faculty of Medicine Ramathibodi Hospital and the Department of Biomedical Engineering, Mahidol University.

Field of Interest

  • Ophthalmic imaging processing

    • Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT)
    • Fundus photography
  • Deep learning for disease prediction
  • Applied AI in Healthcare
